claude_log_tail:
**Verdict: FIX**

**Fix applied:** `TestIsInsideWorktree` was confirmed passing at base before any patch (ran `go test` at the base commit). It was incorrectly placed in `FAIL_TO_PASS`, which would give partial reward (1/3) to a no-op solution. Moved it to `PASS_TO_PASS` as a regression guard.

`TestGetWorktreePath_Cache` and `TestGetWorktreePath_Worktree` are legitimately added by the patch and test caching behavior — kept in `FAIL_TO_PASS`. Minor over-fit note: both call `ClearWorktreePathCache()` (also patch-added), so agents who cache via a different interface would fail to compile these tests.

curator_log.notes: TestIsInsideWorktree was already passing at base (confirmed by running tests pre-patch) and should not be in FAIL_TO_PASS; moved it to PASS_TO_PASS. TestGetWorktreePath_Cache and TestGetWorktreePath_Worktree are added by the patch and call ClearWorktreePathCache() (also patch-added) — moderate over-fit risk since alternative implementations may name the clear function differently, but the tests primarily assert behavioral caching correctness and are retained.
